headline: Verizon (VZ) Joins AT&T And T Mobile To Launch New Mobile Fraud Defense
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), along with AT&T and T-Mobile, has partnered with Aduna on a new cross carrier digital security solution. The offering targets AI driven identity theft across the U.S. mobile ecosystem and moves authentication beyond traditional SMS one time passcodes. The initiative responds to rising fraud losses affecting U.S. consumers, enterprises, and mobile operators. For investors tracking Verizon Communications, the move sits squarely in the core of its wireless and...
